entities.description: selector is a component or operator mentioned in the context of removing it to force reasoners to score all candidate nodes
reasoners are systems or components that score candidate nodes  affected by the removal of selector operators
candidate nodes are the items being scored by reasoners when the selector operators are removed
selector operators are specific components that can be removed to alter the behavior of reasoners

relations.description: the removal of selector operators forces reasoners to score all candidate nodes  indicating a direct operational dependency
removing selector operators directly changes how reasoners operate by forcing them to score all candidate nodes
reasoners perform the action of scoring candidate nodes  especially when selector operators are absent
